Name:
Chains & Whips [Semi-Clean Aca.]
(feat. Kendrick Lamar) (prod. Pharrell Williams)
Notes:
OG Filename: C's&W's ACAPELLA SEMI-CLEAN 4-14-25
Semi-clean acappella for Chains And Whips that was apparently supposed to appear on The Bad Guys 2 film, but didn't end up making the final cut. The files artists are listed as Pusha T and Malice with the file having the title tagged as "DO NOT USE", possibly due to UMG not wanting the song to be on the film due to their previous issues with Pusha deciding to keep Kendrick on the track.
